# 圆方树

```cpp
struct RoundSquareTree{
    vector<vector<int>> G,adj;
    vector<int> dfn,low;
    int dfc,cnt,n;
    int stk[N],top;
    void init(int n){
        this->n=n;
        dfn.assign(n+1,0);
        low.assign(n+1,0);
        top=dfc=0;
        G.assign(2*n+1,{});
        adj.assign(n+1,{}); 
    }
    void tarjan(int u){
        low[u]=dfn[u]=++dfc;
        stk[++top]=u;
        for(auto v:G[u]){
            if(!dfn[v]){
                tarjan(v);
                low[u]=min(low[u],low[v]);
                if(low[u]==dfn[u]){
                    ++cnt;
                    int y;
                    do{
                        y=stk[top--];
                        G[cnt+n].push_back(y);
                        G[y].push_back(cnt+n);
                    }while(y!=v);
                    G[cnt+n].push_back(u);
                    G[u].push_back(cnt+n);
                }
            }
            else low[u]=min(low[u],dfn[v]);
        }
    }
};
```
